_comment: Whitelist of authoritative domains the wp-post-creator citation pass is allowed to link to. Never link to spammy or competitor blogs. Grouped by claim type so the citation pass can narrow candidates by the kind of claim being supported.

regulatory_and_standards.description: Government and industry-standards bodies. Use for any claim about regulations, nutritional minimums, or labeling requirements.

domains.name: AAFCO
domains.use_for: pet food nutritional standards, ingredient definitions, labeling requirements

veterinary_and_health.description: Veterinary medical authorities. Use for any health, nutrition, behavior, or breed-medical claim.

domains.name: AKC
domains.use_for: breed standards, breed-specific traits, training basics

scientific_research.description: Peer-reviewed journals and aggregators. Use for any study citation, percentage, or population statistic.

brand_specs.description: Manufacturer pages for brands reviewed on dogfoodandfun.com. Use ONLY for product spec citations (battery life, weight, accuracy). Never link to brand pages for opinion claims.

domains.name: Fi
domains.use_for: Fi collar specs, battery, GPS accuracy

domains.name: Whistle
domains.use_for: Whistle tracker specs, health monitoring features

domains.name: Ollie
domains.use_for: Ollie fresh food ingredients, recipe sourcing

domains.name: Nom Nom
domains.use_for: Nom Nom ingredients, AAFCO compliance, vet team

blacklist.description: Never insert links to these — competitors, content farms, or low-authority commercial sites.
blacklist._note: Blacklisting Rover/Dogster/WholeDogJournal because they are direct competitors in our niche — linking to them passes authority away from us. Adjust if your strategy changes.

rules.anchor_text_requirements: Specific and descriptive — never 'click here', 'this study', 'source'. Anchor text must paraphrase the cited fact.
rules.fallback_when_no_source_found: Leave the claim unlinked. Never invent a URL. Never link to a non-whitelisted domain to fill a quota.
rules.verify_url_lives: Before insert, the citation pass should HEAD-request the URL to confirm 200 OK. Skip dead links.
